chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 132 of 2012 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 26-05-2022 Agha Faraz Associate of Mr. A.R Faruq, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, D.A.G Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Assistant A.G has placed on record copy of Order dated 24.03.2022, passed in C.P.No.D- 1566 of 2020 (Additional Registrar, High Court of Sindh Bench at Sukkur v. Government of Sindh and others) and other connected Petitions and submits that the controversy regarding exercise of suo moto powers on the basis of newspaper cuttings by this Court has been decided and this matter also arises out of said exercise of powers. On perusal of record, the contention appears to be correct. Therefore, this Petitions stands dismissed on the same grounds, as assigned in the aforesaid Order. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
